title: Rustins Yacht Varnish Satin 500ml
features: Tailored Tung Oil Formula: Our Yacht Varnish, specially formulated with Tung Oil, provides unparalleled protection and durability for marine and external woodwork. Choose between Gloss and Satin finishes to suit your preferences.

Exceptional Adhesion: Experience reliable performance with excellent adhesion. When applied correctly, our varnish ensures a steadfast bond, preventing flaking or peeling. Ideal for enhancing the resilience of exterior doors and window frames.

Withstands UV and Harsh Conditions: Rustins Yacht Varnish meets the challenges of UV sun exposure, saltwater, and harsh marine conditions. Trust in a varnish that remains tough, hard-wearing, and delivers a lasting, high-quality finish. ADD TO BASKET now for superior protection.

Versatility Beyond the Sea: While designed for marine durability, our varnish extends its benefits to various outdoor applications. Enjoy its robust qualities on exterior woodwork, making it a versatile choice for different surfaces.

Maintain Lasting Quality: A testament to its toughness, our Yacht Varnish ensures a durable finish that stands the test of time. The combination of Tung Oil and careful formulation results in a varnish that maintains its high-quality appearance, even in challenging conditions.
description: From the manufacturer Rustins Yacht Varnish Yacht Varnish - Specially formulated on Tung Oil to give maximum protection and durability to marine and other external woodwork. Available in Gloss and Satin. Has excellent adhesion and will not flake or peel when correctly applied. Ideal for exterior doors and window frames. Maximum protection & durability Gloss & satin finish Excellent adhesion About Us In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London.
